/Users/gordie/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -flto -ffast-math -g0 -Werror -Wall -O0 -std=c++23 -Wno-error=limited-postlink-optimizations -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION "--shell-file=/Users/gordie/Developer/C++ Projects/Complex_Final_Proj/cmakelists/emscripten/em_shell.html" -sUSE_WEBGL2=1 --preload-file=shaders --emrun -pthread -Wno-experimental @CMakeFiles/index.dir/objects1.rsp -o index.html @CMakeFiles/index.dir/linkLibs.rsp
